purpose: Core pipeline logic: configuration, file scanning, chunk planning, prompt construction, response parsing, backend clients for Claude, and output writing.

files.purpose: Groups scanned files into token-budgeted chunks for map-reduce generation on large codebases.

keyFunctions.name: estimateFileTokens
keyFunctions.purpose: Rough per-file token estimate (chars/4 + 50 overhead).

keyFunctions.name: estimateTotalTokens
keyFunctions.purpose: Sum of estimated tokens across all files.

keyFunctions.name: buildChunkPlan
keyFunctions.signature: buildChunkPlan(files: ScannedFile[], maxTokensPerChunk?: number, chunkingThreshold?: number): ChunkPlan
keyFunctions.purpose: Groups files by top-level directory, splits groups exceeding the budget, merges small chunks, and returns a ChunkPlan.

files.purpose: Anthropic SDK-backed DocGenerator; sends prompts to the Claude Messages API and parses the responses.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.constructor
keyFunctions.purpose: Reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from env and constructs the Anthropic client; throws with remediation if missing.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.generateDocs
keyFunctions.purpose: Single-shot markdown doc generation via the API; attaches usage tokens to the result.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.generateContext
keyFunctions.purpose: Single-shot .context/ bundle generation via the API.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.analyzeChunk
keyFunctions.signature: analyzeChunk(files: ScannedFile[], chunkLabel: string, projectName: string): Promise<ChunkAnalysis>
keyFunctions.purpose: Analyzes one chunk into a ChunkAnalysis (map phase).

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.synthesizeDocs
keyFunctions.signature: synthesizeDocs(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): Promise<GeneratedDocs>
keyFunctions.purpose: Synthesizes chunk analyses into final markdown docs (reduce phase).

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeApiClient.synthesizeContext
keyFunctions.signature: synthesizeContext(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], files: ScannedFile[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): Promise<ContextBundle>
keyFunctions.purpose: Synthesizes chunk analyses into the .context/ bundle.

files.purpose: Claude Code CLI-backed DocGenerator; spawns the `claude` binary with --print, pipes prompt via stdin, and parses the text output. Intentionally omits --model to avoid empty responses with large stdin.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.check
keyFunctions.purpose: Verifies the `claude` CLI is installed; rejects with an install hint otherwise.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.generateDocs
keyFunctions.purpose: Runs the CLI with the docs prompt; saves raw output to .lumiko/last-response.txt on parse failure.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.generateContext
keyFunctions.purpose: Runs the CLI with the context bundle prompt and parses the multi-file response.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.analyzeChunk
keyFunctions.signature: analyzeChunk(files: ScannedFile[], chunkLabel: string, projectName: string): Promise<ChunkAnalysis>
keyFunctions.purpose: Non-fatal per-chunk analysis; saves debug output for empty responses instead of throwing.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.synthesizeDocs
keyFunctions.signature: synthesizeDocs(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): Promise<GeneratedDocs>
keyFunctions.purpose: Synthesizes docs from chunk analyses via the CLI.

keyFunctions.name: ClaudeCodeClient.synthesizeContext
keyFunctions.signature: synthesizeContext(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], files: ScannedFile[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): Promise<ContextBundle>
keyFunctions.purpose: Synthesizes the .context/ bundle from chunk analyses via the CLI.

keyFunctions.name: runClaude
keyFunctions.purpose: Private: spawns `claude --print --output-format text <instruction>` with stdinData piped, 600s timeout, cwd=tmpdir.

files.purpose: Factory that picks and validates the DocGenerator backend (claude-code or api) based on config and CLI override.

keyFunctions.name: createClient
keyFunctions.purpose: Returns a ClaudeApiClient or ClaudeCodeClient after validating prerequisites (API key / CLI installed).

files.purpose: Loads, creates, and deep-merges `.lumiko/config.yaml` with sensible defaults; detects project name from package.json.

keyFunctions.name: loadConfig
keyFunctions.purpose: Reads .lumiko/config.yaml and deep-merges it with DEFAULT_CONFIG; throws a hint if missing.

keyFunctions.name: createConfig
keyFunctions.purpose: Writes a default .lumiko/config.yaml, filling in project name from package.json when available.

files.purpose: Writes generated markdown docs and the .context/ bundle to disk, generates manifest.json locally, and reports output stats.

keyFunctions.name: writeOutput
keyFunctions.signature: writeOutput(docs: GeneratedDocs, projectPath: string, config: LumikoConfig): Promise<void>
keyFunctions.purpose: Writes README.md/architecture.md/api.md to the output directory and the .context/ bundle + manifest.json.

keyFunctions.name: getOutputStats
keyFunctions.purpose: Lists all written output files with human-readable sizes for the summary.

files.purpose: Defensive parsers for Claude responses: markdown doc sections, chunk analyses, and multi-file .context/ bundles with ---FILE:<path>--- delimiters.

keyFunctions.name: parseGeneratedResponse
keyFunctions.purpose: Extracts README/ARCHITECTURE/API sections using ---SECTION_START/END--- delimiters.

keyFunctions.name: isDocsEmpty
keyFunctions.purpose: Returns true when none of the markdown sections were parsed.

keyFunctions.name: parseChunkAnalysis
keyFunctions.signature: parseChunkAnalysis(content: string, chunkIndex: number, chunkLabel: string, filePaths: string[]): ChunkAnalysis
keyFunctions.purpose: Extracts summary/exports/architecture/API sections for one chunk.

keyFunctions.name: isChunkAnalysisEmpty
keyFunctions.purpose: Returns true when the chunk analysis contains only placeholder values.

keyFunctions.name: parseContextBundle
keyFunctions.signature: parseContextBundle(content: string): { bundle: ContextBundle; invalidEntries: Array<{ path: string; error: string }> }
keyFunctions.purpose: Splits a response on ---FILE:<path>--- markers, strips stray code fences, parses JSON files, and collects invalid JSON separately.

keyFunctions.name: isBundleEmpty
keyFunctions.purpose: Returns true when no bundle entries were parsed.

files.purpose: Central prompt builders for both backends: short CLI instructions and long stdin/API prompts for docs, context bundles, chunk analysis, and synthesis.

keyFunctions.name: buildCodebaseContext
keyFunctions.signature: buildCodebaseContext(files: ScannedFile[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): string
keyFunctions.purpose: Builds the long prompt with project info, file tree, source contents, and delimiter-formatted sections for markdown docs.

keyFunctions.name: buildContextPrompt
keyFunctions.signature: buildContextPrompt(files: ScannedFile[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig): string
keyFunctions.purpose: Builds the multi-file .context/ bundle prompt with module groupings and ---FILE:<path>--- schema instructions.

keyFunctions.name: buildChunkAnalysisPrompt
keyFunctions.signature: buildChunkAnalysisPrompt(files: ScannedFile[], chunkLabel: string, projectName: string): string
keyFunctions.purpose: Builds the prompt for analyzing one chunk into summary/exports/architecture/API sections.

keyFunctions.name: buildSynthesisPrompt
keyFunctions.signature: buildSynthesisPrompt(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig, allFiles: ScannedFile[]): string
keyFunctions.purpose: Builds the reduce-phase prompt combining chunk analyses into final markdown docs.

keyFunctions.name: buildContextSynthesisPrompt
keyFunctions.signature: buildContextSynthesisPrompt(analyses: ChunkAnalysis[], projectName: string, config: LumikoConfig, allFiles: ScannedFile[]): string
keyFunctions.purpose: Builds the reduce-phase prompt combining chunk analyses into the .context/ bundle.

keyFunctions.name: getModuleKey
keyFunctions.purpose: Converts a file path into a module key (e.g. 'src/core/x.ts' -> 'src-core', root files -> '_root').

keyFunctions.name: groupFilesByModule
keyFunctions.purpose: Groups scanned files by their immediate parent directory.

files.purpose: Walks the project using include/exclude globs, reads files under 100KB, skips binaries, and builds a file tree string.

keyFunctions.name: scanProject
keyFunctions.purpose: Globs files, filters by size (<100KB) and binary content, and returns ScannedFile[] with totals.

keyFunctions.name: buildFileTree
keyFunctions.purpose: Renders scanned files as an ASCII tree (├── / └──) for inclusion in prompts.
